sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِأُسْلُوبٍ قَوِيٍّ وَبَلِيغٍ جِدّاً.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik se odlikuje veoma snažnim i rječitim stilom.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is characterized by a very strong and eloquent style.

sentences.arabic: بَعْضُ الْكُتَّابِ يَكْتُبُونَ نُثُوراً تُشْبِهُ فِي جَمَالِهَا لُغَةَ الْقُرْآنِ الْكَرِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Neki pisci pišu prozu koja svojom ljepotom podsjeća na jezik Časnog Kur'ana.
sentences.translationEn: Some writers write prose that resembles the language of the Holy Quran in its beauty.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْأُسْلُوبُ يَسْتَخْدِمُ السَّجْعَ وَالتَّوَازُنَ بَيْنَ الْجُمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj stil koristi rimu i ravnotežu između rečenica.
sentences.translationEn: This style uses rhyme and balance between sentences.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الْقَارِئُ بِالرَّاحَةِ عِنْدَ قِرَاءَةِ هَذِهِ النُّصُوصِ الْعَمِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čitalac osjeća smirenost dok čita ove duboke tekstove.
sentences.translationEn: The reader feels comfort when reading these deep texts.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهَا تَعْكِسُ عِظَمَ التُّرَاثِ الْأَدَبِيِّ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: To odražava veličinu arapske književne baštine.
sentences.translationEn: It reflects the greatness of the Arabic literary heritage.
